body: The dep command only adds blocking dependencies. There is no way to remove a dependency once added, short of manually editing the JSON file in the worktree. Add a --remove/-r flag to the dep command, e.g. 'gittoc dep T-4 --remove T-1', or a separate 'undep' command. Without this, a mistyped dependency requires manual file surgery.
title: No way to remove dependencies from a ticket
